statement.p: A shirt is on sale for 20\% off. The sale price is \$51.00\text{.} Write an equation based on this scenario where the solution represents the shirts original price.

solution.p: Let x represent the original price of the shirt. Since 20\% is removed to bring the cost down to \$51\text{,} we can set up the equation:
This equations solution will be the original price of the shirt, but for now we do not need to solve the equation.
